name: toon-meta
description: TOON Protocol shared agent skills — install in any TOON repo to get NIP-on-TOON, ILP/RFC (localized to TOON), git-on-Nostr, content/social, and dev-utility skills.

plugins.name: toon-skills
plugins.description: Shared TOON Protocol skills: Nostr NIP implementations on TOON, Interledger RFC references (TOON-localized to the signed-claim-over-BTP model), git-on-Nostr, content/social, and dev utilities. Product skills (toon-client, townhouse-operator) ship in their own product plugins.
